description:
Cuddling with your secret BF~

̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅ ̅

•“No one really knows me like Harvey~”•

💙 I’m a sucker for fluff bots 💙

There is Limited other Phighters included in the bot! They aren’t in the intro so feel free to use other Phighters!

Wow 3 bots one day, I’m a good worker 🗣️

Just at home with your BF~
